item.title: Version 2.0.1
item.description:
What's New in 2.0.1

  • Hotwords: Add a custom word list in Settings to boost recognition of names, jargon, and acronyms. Uses sherpa-onnx modified beam search when active; greedy search resumes when the list is empty.

2.0.0 Highlights

  • New speech engine: Replaced WhisperKit/CoreML with sherpa-onnx + NVIDIA Parakeet TDT 0.6B (int8). Lower word error rate (~6% vs ~8%) and 2-5x faster inference.
  • Apple-native redesign: Overhauled visuals to match macOS design language: system fills, separators, accent-colored waveform, standardized spacing and radii.
  • Apple Intelligence text cleanup: Optional on-device grammar and filler-word removal via Foundation Models (macOS 26+).
  • Silero VAD segmentation: Voice activity detection strips silence and caps segments at 15 s to prevent transducer looping.
  • Electron app fix: Clipboard-paste insertion for VS Code, Slack, Chrome, and other Electron/browser apps (no more doubled text).
